'''Spellcraft''' is one of the magic systems of the Willverse.

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Magic is derived from a medium known as the [[Aether]]. Practitioners utilize fundamental skills such as basic [[Aetheric manipulation]] and [[Aether telekinesis]] to interact with this force. This manipulation is achieved through the use of symbols, which can be traced by hand or manifested as glowing markings known as [[Aetheric sigils]]. These sigils can serve various functions, such as providing alerts or appearing as swirling white discs during specific spells. Furthermore, symbols can be utilized within spinning discs to perform spell analysis.

Specialized forms of magic exist, including [[elementalism]] and [[sealing magic]]. Sealing and [[binding]] magic is a specific discipline that is slower than [[elementalism]] and can be resisted using [[aura]]. Practitioners use various spells, such as pathfinding spells—which can visualize known routes, be linked to other individuals, and alert users to enemies—or invisibility spells that manifest as glowing, nebulous energy. Certain complex Aetheric formulas can even facilitate rebirth.

A significant rank within this system is the [[Archmage]], a level of wizardry achieved by humans capable of utilizing large-[[scale]] magic. Archmages possess advanced capabilities, such as the ability to understand the sharing of [[Aetheric patterns]].

The [[Aether]] is a powerful force capable of causing massive disruptions, such as twisting the sky or affecting entire rituals. It can even determine if an individual lives two lives.}}

== Spells ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Cosmic Path]]}} • {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[pathfinding spell]]}} • {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Terminus Mundi]]}} • {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[contract magic]]}} • {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Subspace warp]]}}

[[Category:Magic systems]]
